transcript: San Francisco, it may be difficult for me to hear you with the phone being stationary, but that’s good. Hopefully, you can hear me. Uh…
So we’ll have a little fun tonight… We’re gonna try to do this. Make a few calls, here. And so forth. Top o’ the evening to you. [laughs] [delay]
Voodoo Doughnut 24 hours. What can I do for you?
Wait, uh, hold on a second.
Now wha— what did you just say?
Voodoo Doughnut 24 hours. What can I do for you?
Listen, I need about 800 doughnuts. Now what’s the best way to proceed? [exhales]
Um, well, I’m gonna give my phone to— I’m gonna give the phone to my manager and he can help— definitely help you out with getting that order done.
Um, I’m pretty sure. What time—? What— what’s the timeframe you’re thinking about gettin’ ‘em?
I’m at the penitentiary, here, and we got a lotta inmates. They’re threatening to overtake the, uh, penitentiary! Uh… So I’m doin’ everything I can—
So…[pitch-down] What do you think, here? What do you think, here?—
15 minutes is, unfortunately, not a good time frame.
[pitch-down] What do you think, here? What do you think? [delay]

I mean, that would be a heck of a thing to do to somebody like that! And they’ve left the conversation. Well, we’re gonna do somethin’ else, now. Go in a different direction! Oh, sure, we are! Sure, we are. Oh, yeah! [exhales]
[“Cum On Feel The Noize” by Quiet Riot plays in background]
Hey, yeah, um… you got men up ‘ere?
Uh… Okay. You got leather up ‘ere?
Uh, no. Think you got your— thinkin’ of The Eagle.
The Eagle, oh, that could be. Is Tutti up ‘ere?!
No, we’re— we’re not a— like, a themed club.
I didn’t say ya were. [delay]Listen, do you wanna get together and—
Yeah, we don’t have arm wrestling, either.
You don’t have arm wrestling. You got leg wrestling, right?
Uh… possibly. You’d have to talk to the girls.
Is a girl there I can talk to? No?

No? ‘Kay. ‘Kay, ‘kay. Not an issue, not an issue at all because, as he indicated, there’s another club across the street and that’s where we’re goin’. That is where we’re goin’ in fact! So let’s do that, right here. [exhales]
Oh, yeah, just like that. Just like that! Hey. Hey. Okay. They hung up; they did, they did. Uncool. San Francisco—
Yeah, I can barely hear y— Why’d you hang up on me just now?
I couldn’t hear you then, either.
Why’d you hang up on me, tough guy?
’Kay. Least we got that worked out. ‘Kay, we’re gonna just scoot through these, here; I hope that works with your, uh, decency, San Francisco. I do, I do, I do. How are we don’ tonight?! [exhales]
How are we doin’ toniight?! [delay, pitch-shifted] Hey, okay, okay, hey. Okay, we’re callin’ a number.
Club SinRock. This’s Marilyn. How can I help you?
D’you have any dancing men up there?
Is this thing on? [laughs] So loud! Jeez. Okay, we’re moving right along.
[sample of Wayne Bent disciples cheering, shouting, “Liberty!”]
Hi, yeah! Okay, listen, I need to come up there. My name’s Henry. How late are you open, first of all?
We close at eleven o’clock tonight.

Okay, I can hurry and be there in just a few minutes, but, uh… I need to sample, uh, everything that I need. I just was gonna bring a straw up there. Kinda sample and dabble in everything I need! How’s that sound?
You “cannot”? Well, how much can you accommodate—?
We cannot— We don’t do any sampling.
Oh. Well he—here, talk to my— Talk to my father, okay? Uh…
He— He’ll— Here, just a second, here.
[ Wayne Bent samples]Well, uh…—One day, by myself, I sat down in my chair—just relaxing—and then God said to me, “You are Messiah.”—
[ Wayne Bent samples]I am Messiah—It wasn’t at my instruction or behest—
Okay, did you hear what he had to say up ‘ere?
What d— What did you need? I have customers that just came in.
What are your thoughts on that, ya know?
[sample of Wayne Bent disciple]Well, he is the Messiah. He is… Uh… Uh… To me he is Christ returned in spirit.
[laughs]Hey, I only wanna dabble in what I need! I only wanna sample what it is that I need! [exhales] So, uh, we’re gonna go to your competitor! [inhales]
[ Wayne Bent sample]It is a defining moment—
[ Wayne Bent sample] [delay, pitch-shifted]It is a defining moment and God’s people are going to be vindicated and—

Hell of a deal! Listen, uh, I’m gonna bring my straw up ‘ere. It’s flexible. Just gonna kinda shop around and see what, uh, see what I need, see what I like, see what strikes my fancy; does that sound good?
Just sample things, dabble around—sample everything I need! Whatever just, uh, floats my boat; does that work for you guys up at Aloha tonight?
’Kay, I can give ya four, five dollars! Just, ya know, crack things open here, crack things open there… Sample everything I need. [exhales] What’s the flavor—?
That probably wouldn’t go over very well, but… ya know.
Oh, it wouldn’t, huh? Why do you say that?—
No, sir. Uh, you can’t open bottles in the store, much less, uh, steal alcohol, so…
Well I’ll keep it real covert. I’m not gonna draw a buncha attention to myself.
Uh, that’s okay, we got great cameras.
I didn’t wanna tell ya this but I already took a few sips here and there when I was walkin’ through the aisles earlier.
Hey, I’m an honest man! I’m an honest man, hundred percent. Got off work, I couldn’t decide, ya know, I’m an honest man. I took a few sips here ’n there—
Well, then we will look into that for you and, uh, check the videos—
Yeah! We got great cameras, here. I’m sorry, we have customers, here, so have a wonderful evening!—
I didn’t wanna tell you this but I made a few recordings of my own, though, when I was up there earlier. Didn’t like what I heard! Did not like the sound—
—that I was hearin’ up ‘ere. So you guys—?
Okay, would you like to contact the owner?
What do I need to talk to the owner for?
Oh, well, if you said you didn’t like what you heard…
Listen, I’m willing to let it go. I’m just gonna come up and dabble in some different flavors and sample what I need, alright? It’s not gonna be a big deal—
That sounds wonderful! [clinking of coins] Yeah, yeah, do that, do that and we will take care of that for ya![to customer] Ten, eleven, twelve, thirteen, fourteen—and thirty-six—
[to LPC] No! No, sir, I’m not threatening you at all!
Look, all I’m trying to do is wet m’whistle here tonight. I don’t know what I want. I might want schnapps, I might not. Ya know, when I get up there—
—maybe want a hip hugger, I may not, ya know, I’m not…
Alright. Well have a great evening and I’ll see you soon!
I’ll be up there. I’m just gonna, ya know, take a few gulps here ’n there—
Okay. Alright! We got cameras. Have a great night! Bye!—
I will let ya know what I decide!
Okay, folks, so, uh, moral o’ that story is:'”Don’t go, uh, gulpin’ around [exhales] up at Aloha Liquor. Or if ya do, he’s gonna videa-tape y’ass!”'[laughs] Okay, we got another line ringin’ here.
[sample of Wayne Bent disciple]I know that people think we’re gonna commit suicide, but I can’t comprehend it—
Hey, yeah, um, listen, guy, like I said, I’m just really thirsty tonight and I need a variety o’ flavors and tastes and I’m on my way up ‘ere. I’m just gonna—
—let ya know right off hand, up h— right up front, alright?
Yeah, h—how late y’all open tonight?
Uh, 10:55 every night of the week.

Okay, listen, I’m looking for somethin’. I don’t know what it is—what I’m in the mood for. I’m just gonna come up ’n dabble ’n sample some different things—bring my straw; does that sound alright with you guys up ‘ere?
You can… look at anything, yeah. Um… We— we don’t— We can’t have any open containers in here, though. And it’s not, like— We don’t really sample, um, items.

No, I need to go ‘head ’n crack open just a few things. I’m not gonna make a big scene or draw attention to myself. But, uh, yeah, I’m gonna crack a few things open here tonight—pour a few things back, see what direction I wanna go in, alright? And you’re open for another hour, right? Yeah, that should be enough time.—
Yeah. Okay, have a wonderful evening!—
Take a few sips here, few sips there, okay?

I’ll see ya in a few minutes. Okay, good. Good deal. That guy is… gone. And that’s okay. Let’s see. We got another couple things here in store for ya. Let’s see if we can get some more action on the phone. San Francisco, so happy to be with you tonight! Thank you for hangin’ in there.
[ Wayne Bent samples]Yes. Yes.—We are naked and unashamed—
I hope you can hear me.
[ Wayne Bent samples]I am the embodiment of God. I am… Divinity and humanity combined.—Uh…[delay, pitch-shifted]—Well—
[sample of Wayne Bent disciples cheering, shouting, “Liberty!”]
Club SinRock. This’s Marilyn. How can I help you?
Hey, yeah, I need a— I wanna bring a party o’ six up ‘ere.
I can barely hear ya. Hello?
I’m here. I— Well it’s a club, sweetie. [laughs]
[delay, pitch-shifted, speed-shifted]How are we doin’ tonight?![repeats]
We’re open. You can come in.
I— “Sasha”? I don’t know a Sasha. Your phone’s like echoing, too.
No, I’m at a payphone, here. I’m—
Okay, I’m just saying your phone’s echoing. We don’t have a Sasha— dancer by that name unless she goes by a different name.
We have dancers, though. We have, like, 20 dancers.
[delay] You, you’re like repeating and stuff on your end; not sure why that is, but… Um… Who—? How many dancers ya got up ‘ere?
Uh-huh? Oh, wow! How many da—? How many girls are dancin’ right now?
Uh, sweetheart, I’m—I’m bartending, so if you wanted to come in, we’re open, we have girls. Okay?
Oh, you do? How late are you open?—
And did you say Dixie’s spinnin’ around up ‘ere?

You’re—you’re literally— Everything you’re saying is echoing. I can’t— I don’t even understand what you’re saying. So we’re open, if you wanna come, you’re more than welcome to come. We have a whole buncha girls and a few dancers, okay?—
You’re, like, repeating and shouting right now. I can’t really tell what you’re doing, but, uh… [inhales] Uh, that’s just how you are, I guess.
Hey, uh, what’s goin’ on? Harry?
Uh, this is Seth. I’m your new neighbor. I just moved in ‘round the bend, here. And—

Yeah, and I noticed you were outside, uh… a lot the last few days and, uh, need— just wanna make sure you’re gonna be inside in the morning. I use a big horsewhip; I’m gonna be out there practicing. I just don’t need any… ya know, liability, responsibility.
Yeah, knock yourself out. Yeah, that’s great.
Yeah, so just stay outta the way and just stay indoors, if that’s okay.
You got a problem with that, or…?
I said— Wha—what’s that? Are you gonna…? ‘Cause, ya know, I got a 28-foot horse whip I’ve got spinnin’ around, guy. Okay?
Okay, thanks, man! Thanks for givin’ me a heads-up.
I’m givin’ ya a heads-up. It’s gonna be about 4 AM ’til about 9 AM. Looks like a doggone propeller flyin’ through the air up ‘ere when I get that thin spinnin’ around! [exhales]
Alright. LPC, I think we gotta wrap it up.
Thank you. [delay] Thank you! Thank you so much! Thank you! Thank you! Thank you! Thanks so much for your time, San Francisco!
